### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Queries](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Queries.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Queries')

## EventStoreQueryTypeAttribute Class

Overrides the convention\-derived query type name for a query class\.
When applied, NamingConventionEngine\.GetQueryTypeName returns this
attribute's value instead of deriving from the type name\.

```csharp
public sealed class EventStoreQueryTypeAttribute : System.Attribute
```
